payments.title: Payment
payments.info1:
※ If you pay by Virtual Account / Credit Card / Real-time bank transfer, you will not receive a tax invoice.
You can print your credit card sales slip or cash receipt (proof of expenditure) and use it as a tax invoice.
payments.info-use-netmoney: ※ Extend the service period to a Netmoney balance.
payments.contract-info: [The monthly fee of {first} has been discounted (Period {second} ~ {third})]
payments.require-login: You need to re-login to use the solution
payments.card-limit-info-title: ※ Payment limit for each credit card company when paying with Net Money Charging Card (applies separately from the individual credit card limit)
payments.card-limit-info:
- The Financial Services Commission's online payment security guidelines have strengthened credit card use policies for cash-strapped merchants.
- There is a difference in each credit card company's payment policy, so please check the above information to ensure that there is no inconvenience in using the service.
payments.info: ※ Please make a deposit to the following account and we will process your payment after confirming your payment. (Deposit processing time : Weekday AM 09:00 ~ PM 06:30 / Sat. AM 09:30 ~ PM 03:00 If you want to process immediately outside the deposit processing time, please use the card payment and real time account transfer.)
payments.failed-pay: Payment failed. Please try your payment again.
payments.desc1: ※ 충전한 금액은 자동이체 청구시 이용료와 합산되어 출금됩니다.

payment-result.info: ※ Please make a deposit to the following account and we will process your payment after confirming your payment. (Deposit processing time : Weekday AM 09:00 ~ PM 06:30 / Sat. AM 09:30 ~ PM 03:00 If you want to process immediately outside the deposit processing time, please use the card payment and real time account transfer.)
payment-result.failed-pay: Payment failed. Please try your payment again.
payment-result.failed-pay-netmoney:
Payment is being processed.
After 5 minutes, please click your ID at the top right corner → go to Payment Management → Netmoney History to check if the netmoney has been successfully charged.
If it hasn’t been charged, please contact our customer support at 1544-4634.
payment-result.failed-pay-expiry-date:
Payment is being processed.
After 5 minutes, please click your ID at the top right corner → go to Payment Management → Extension Expiry Date to check if the expiry date has been successfully extended.
If it hasn’t been extended, please contact our customer support at 1544-4634.

services.online-description-note2: * Service Detail : Service detail information showed on online bookings.
services.every-resources-can-perform-this-service: Every booking resources can perform this service
services.choose-resources-can-perform-this-servic: Choose resource can perform this service
services.guide-content:
Processing Time

This is the time during which the service does not require staff work.(E.g., the time between pre-treatment and finishing during perm or coloring.)
For the processing time, the staff can accept other bookings.

Finishing Time

This is the time required to complete the service after processing.


※ Total estimated timeof the service = Estimated time + Processing Time + Finishing Time.

branch-sales.note-1: * Revenue Total = Service Total + Product Total
branch-sales.note-2: * Sales Total = Service Sales + Product Sales + Prepaid Goods Sales

branch-sales.note-5: * Printing is applied on per-page basis.

virtual-account.info0: * Please click the 'Issue Virtual Account' button to issue the disposable account.
virtual-account.info1:
※ Depositless payment(disposable deposit account)
- Re-log in after completing the deposit, the Netmoney charge / Expiry Date Extension will be immediately done.
virtual-account.info2:
※ Virtual Account Progress Guide
- When you make the payment, the account number to be deposited will be issued.
- Please make a bank transfer to internet banking or CD / ATM machine (cash machine).
(Please note: CD / ATM equipment must be transferred using bankbook or card (no cash deposit available))
- Deposits can only be made with the correct amount. (Depositors may be different.)
- Deposit time is 24 hours (please get a new virtual account number when you make a deposit later)
- Unable to transfer cash card or alliance card from stock firm
- Charge bank fees and booking transfer is not allowed
virtual-account.info3:
※ If you pay by Virtual Account / Credit Card / Real-time bank transfer, you will not receive a tax invoice.
You can print your credit card sales slip or cash receipt (proof of expenditure) and use it as a tax invoice.
virtual-account.info4: ■ When you make the deposit to below virtual account, It will be processed automatically.(Virtual Account is vaild only 24 hours)

branch-prepaid-goods.title: Branch Prepaid Goods
branch-prepaid-goods.note-1: * Remaining Amount for Prepaid Services = Remaining Quantity * Revenue per Service
branch-prepaid-goods.note-2: * The balance on Discount Card = Sales Amount x (Remaining period / Total available period)
branch-prepaid-goods.note-3: * Remaining Amount for Unlimited Qty Prepaid Services = Sales Amount x (Remaining period / Total available period)

sales-by-date.tooltip-prepaid-sales-counting:

- Sales: Service/Product/Prepaid Goods Sales (Excluding Prepaid Goods Deduction)
- Revenue: Service/Product Sales and Prepaid Goods Deduction. (Excluding Prepaid Goods Sales)

- Revenue: Service/Product Sales and Prepaid Goods Deduction. (Excluding Prepaid Goods Sales)

branch.delete-branch-group-alarm-message: There is a branch belongs to this branch group. Are you sure you want to delete?
branch.a-total-of-10: A total of {items} out of {sumItems} branches are displayed.

clients-by-period.title: Clients by Period
clients-by-period.note-1: * Visiting Clients: The number of clients with sales for the inquiry period.
clients-by-period.note-2: * Visiting Members: The number of clients with prepaid goods sales or deduction among the visiting clients.
clients-by-period.note-3-sub-1: - The count is based on unique clients, regardless of the number of visits. (e.g., if Jhon visits twice within the selected period, the client count remains as one.)
clients-by-period.note-3-sub-2: - Even if a new client revisits within the selected period, they are counted only in the new client count.

clients-summary.title: Clients Summary
clients-summary.label-dormant-client-criteria: Dormant Client Criteria: No visit in
clients-summary.label-note-member: * Member : Clients who have valid prepaid goods and are not dormant.
clients-summary.label-note-non-member: * Non Member : Clients who do not have valid prepaid goods and are not dormant. (Including expired members.)

if-you-have-any-question-while-using-aha.first: If you have any questions while using AhaSoft Plus,
if-you-have-any-question-while-using-aha.second: please callor chat with our customer service team.

help-center.sundays-and-holidays-leave-the-message: On Sundays and holidays, please leave a message in chat and we will respond to you during our business hours.

new-clients-repeat.title: New Clients Repeat
new-clients-repeat.note-1: * New clients are counted based on the first visit date of the client.
new-clients-repeat.note-2: * The number of repeat clients includes only the first revisit. (For example, if a new client revisits in Feb and March, it will only be included in February)
new-clients-repeat.note-3: * If the staff is changed when the client revisits, it is counted as the repeat of the first sales staff.
new-clients-repeat.note-4: * If a client’s first sales has more than one staff, it is counted as a new clients of multi-staffs.

depositless-payments.info:
※ Depositless payment may take some time because the payment is processed after the administrator confirms the payment during client center operation hours.
(Weekdays 09:00am ~ 06:30pm / Saturday 09:30am ~ 03:00pm)
depositless-payments.info1: ※ Re-log in after receiving the completing the deposit text message, the Netmoney charge / Expiry Date Extension will be immediately done.
depositless-payments.title: ■ Depositless payment Notification
depositless-payments.mobile-phone-number-info: * After confirmation of payment, a completed text message will be sent to the corresponding number.
depositless-payments.info2: ※ If you want immediate Netmoney charge / Expiry Date Extension,Please use Depositless payment(Virtual Account)

new-clients-by-month.title: New Clients by Month
new-clients-by-month.label-note: * New clients are counted based on the ‘first visit date’ of the client.

new-clients-by-referral-source.title: New Clients by Referral Source
new-clients-by-referral-source.label-note-1: * New clients are counted based on the ‘first visit date’ of the client.

bookings-ratio.title: Booking Ratio
bookings-ratio.label-note-scheduled-clients: * Number of Scheduled Clients = Number of bookings(excluding walk-ins, canceled and no-show bookings).
bookings-ratio.label-note-unscheduled-clients: * Number of Unscheduled Clients = Number of sales(excluding cancellation fee sales) - Number of scheduled clients.

sales-report.title: Sales Report
sales-report.label-no-sale-and-amount-per-sale: No. of Sales & Amount per Sale
sales-report.label-total-outstanding-desc: * Total Outstanding created for the filtered period: {total}
sales-report.sales-total-note-1: - This metric is based on the total sales amount, excluding Prepaid Goods Deduction.
sales-report.sales-total-note-2: - It represents the total sales amount generated in the shop during the selected period, including Prepaid Goods Sales.
sales-report.sales-total-note-3: - This metric is based on actual revenue, excluding Prepaid Goods Sales.
sales-report.sales-total-note-4: - Prepaid Goods Sales are recognized as liabilities rather than revenue, and only the amount paid through Prepaid Goods Deduction is reflected as revenue.
sales-report.sales-total-note-5: - If a sale item has partially paid by balance, the quantity is counted twice as a sale and balance deduction.
sales-report.sales-total-note-6: - Amounts deducted using points are excluded from revenue.
sales-report.sales-total-note-7: - This metric is based on the actual amount received in the shop, aggregated by payment date.
sales-report.sales-total-note-8: - Differences may occur between Sales Total and Payment Total due to booking deposit or outstanding balances.
sales-report.sales-total-note-9: * Booking Cancellation Fee is counted as service sales.
sales-report.sales-by-staff-note-1: * Quantity and Amount of the Service/Product sales includes refunds.
sales-report.sales-by-staff-note-2: * Quantity of the Prepaid Goods sales exclude refunds. (Amount of the prepaid goods sales include refunds.).
sales-report.sales-by-staff-note-3: * If a prepaid service is paid by balance, the balance amount is excluded from sales amount. (If it was fully paid by balance, the qty is excluded also.).
sales-report.sales-by-staff-note-4: * If a sales item has sold by multiple staffs, the qty is duplicated for each staff.
sales-report.sales-total-detail-by-staff-note-1: * If there are multiple staffs for a sales item, payment amount is calculated by the staff sales ratio.
sales-report.sales-total-detail-by-staff-note-2: * Service payment amount includes prepaid goods sales.
sales-report.sales-by-item-note-1: * In the Service/Product report, if a sales item has partially paid by balance, the quantity is counted twice as sales and balance deduction.
sales-report.sales-by-item-note-2: * Sales amount does not include points deduction.
sales-report.sales-by-item-note-3: * In the Prepaid Service report, the amount paid by balance is excluded from sales amount. (If the prepaid service is fully paid by balance, the qty is excluded also.).
sales-report.sales-by-item-note-4: * If a sales item has sold by multiple staffs, the qty is duplicated for each staff.

prepaid-cards.this-title: Discount for clients having this card
prepaid-cards.this-guide-mean: ∙ Option ‘No’ on Client can have multiple prepaid cards balance separately.
prepaid-cards.this-guide-action: ∙ Option can be selected under Setup > Environment Setup Menu.

prepaid-cards.warning-discount-card-can-not-have-charg: Discount card can not have charge amount.

prepaid-cards.if-the-prepaid-card-has-no-earned-amount: * If the  prepaid card has no earned amount, select the “Discount Card” option in the prepaid card type.

requirement.desc-size: The logo is automatically resized (maximum size 130px x 35px)
requirement.desc-size-desktop: The logo is automatically resized with a ratio of 130x35px. To prevent image distortion, the minimum image size should be 260x70px.
requirement.desc-size-mobile: The logo is automatically resized with a ratio of 60x25px. To prevent image distortion, the minimum image size should be 120x50px.
requirement.desc-ext: The format of the image file supports PNG, JPEG, JPG, HEIC, HEIF.
requirement.desc-exceed: Image files cannot be larger than 1 MB.
requirement.logo-click-url: Please enter the address of the site you want to go to when you click the logo, otherwise you will be directed to the AhaPlus home screen.
requirement.error-photo-alert: The file below failed to upload. Please check the file and upload it again.
requirement.CI01C: The ImagePath must be a string with a maximum length of 1000
requirement.CI02C: The ImageName must be a string with a maximum length of 200
requirement.CI05C: The Chain Image does not exist
requirement.CI07C: The Chain Image is already set up.
requirement.CI08C: The Image files must be less than 1MB.
requirement.CI09C: The Image files must have 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'heic', 'heif' extension
requirement.CI11C: The Image Link URL must be a string with a maximum length of 500.
requirement.CI12C: The Image Name must be a string with a maximum length of 250.
requirement.CI000: An unknown error has occurred. Please contact the admin for further investigation.
requirement.CIFE01: The external link is not allowed due to security concerns.
requirement.CIFE02: An unsafe internal link has been detected. Please review the URL or contact the admin regarding the link you want to save.
requirement.CIFE03: The URL you entered is not valid.
requirement.CIFE04: A valid URL must start with 'https://'.
